zh.lifeSummary: 當William Douglas 9th Earl of Angus於1532年出生在蘇格蘭金加迪爾格倫維時，他的父親Archibald Douglas 1st of Glenbervie30歲，母親Agnes Keith of Marischal29歲。他於1552年2月14日與Egidia Graham在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾亨特利結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1591年7月1日在蘇格蘭費伏列文享年59歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭金加迪爾格倫維。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Douglas 9th Earl of Angus于1532年出生在苏格兰金加迪爾格倫維时，他的父亲Archibald Douglas 1st of Glenbervie30岁，母亲Agnes Keith of Marischal29岁。他于1552年2月14日与Egidia Graham在英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾亨特利结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1591年7月1日在苏格兰費伏列文享年59岁，埋葬在苏格兰金加迪爾格倫維。

nameMeanings.name: Douglas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called from their situation on a river named with Gaelic dubh ‘dark, black’ + glas ‘stream’ (a derivative of glas ‘blue’). There are several localities in Scotland and Ireland so named, but the one from which the surname is derived in most if not all cases is Douglas in Lanarkshire 20 miles south of Glasgow, the original stronghold of the influential Douglas family and their retainers.

History: The family taking their name from Douglas in Lanarkshire were of Flemish origin. They rose to great prominence in the 14th and 15th centuries, controlling the earldoms of Douglas, Morton, and Angus, and later, Queensberry.

variants.name: Douglass
meanings: Scottish and English (Durham and Northumbria): variant of   Douglas  .

History: William Douglass, a physician recognized for his identification and description of an epidemic of scarlet fever, was born c. 1691 in Gifford, Haddington County, Scotland, and settled in Boston in 1718. The abolitionist, orator, and journalist Frederick Douglass assumed the name after escaping from slavery in 1838 and traveling to Massachusetts. Son of a white father and a slave with some Indian blood, he was born Frederick Augustus Washington Bailey c. 1817 in Tuckahoe, MD.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Douglas 9th Earl of Angus was born in 1532, in Glenbervie, Kincardineshire, Scotland, his father, Archibald Douglas 1st of Glenbervie, was 30 and his mother, Agnes Keith of Marischal, was 29. He married Egidia Graham on 14 February 1552, in Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 1 July 1591, in Leven, Fife, Scotland, at the age of 59, and was buried in Glenbervie, Kincardineshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Douglas 9th Earl of Angus est né en 1532, à Glenbervie, Kincardineshire, Écosse, son père, Archibald Douglas 1st of Glenbervie, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Agnes Keith of Marischal, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Egidia Graham le 14 février 1552, à Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 1 juillet 1591, à Leven, Fife, Écosse, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Glenbervie, Kincardineshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Douglas 9th Earl of Angus 1532 in Glenbervie, Kincardineshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Archibald Douglas 1st of Glenbervie 30 und seine Mutter Agnes Keith of Marischal 29. Er hat am 14. Februar 1552 in Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Egidia Graham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 1. Juli 1591 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Leven, Fife, Scotland und wurde in Glenbervie, Kincardineshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Douglas 9th Earl of Angus è nato il nel 1532 nel Glenbervie, Kincardineshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Archibald Douglas 1st of Glenbervie, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Keith of Marischal, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Egidia Graham il 14 febbraio 1552, nel Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 1 luglio 1591, nel Leven, Fife, Scotland, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Glenbervie, Kincardineshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: William Douglas 9th Earl of Angusが1532年にスコットランドキンカーディンエシュアイアグレンバーヴィで生まれた時，父Archibald Douglas 1st of Glenbervieは30歳，母Agnes Keith of Marischalは29歳であった。1552年2月14日にイギリススコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアハントリーでEgidia Grahamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1591年7月1日にスコットランドフィフレベンで59歳で死去し，スコットランドキンカーディンエシュアイアグレンバーヴィにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Douglas 9th Earl of Angus(이)가 1532년 스컷랜드 킨카딘실르 글렌버비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Archibald Douglas 1st of Glenbervie(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Keith of Marischal(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1552년 2월 14일 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르 헌틀리에서 Egidia Graham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1591년 7월 1일 스컷랜드 피프 레븐에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 킨카딘실르 글렌버비에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Douglas 9th Earl of Angus nasceu em 1532, em Glenbervie, Kincardineshire, Scotland, seu pai, Archibald Douglas 1st of Glenbervie, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Keith of Marischal, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Egidia Graham em 14 de fevereiro de 1552, em Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1 de julho de 1591, em Leven, Fife, Scotland, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Glenbervie, Kincardineshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Douglas 9th Earl of Angus родился в 1532 г. в местности гленбирви, кинкардаинешир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Archibald Douglas 1st of Glenbervie было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Keith of Marischal, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Egidia Graham 14 февраля 1552 г. в местности хантли, абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 1 июля 1591 г. в местности ливен, фиф, Шотландия в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности гленбирви, кинкардаинешир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Douglas 9th Earl of Angus nació en 1532, en Glenbervie, Kincardineshire, Scotland, su papá, Archibald Douglas 1st of Glenbervie, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Agnes Keith of Marischal, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Egidia Graham el 14 de febrero de 1552, en Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 1 de julio de 1591, en Leven, Fife, Scotland, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Glenbervie, Kincardineshire, Scotland.
